features: Wrap Any Gift Immediately: Each package includes 10 sets of 6.1 inch x 2.9 inch x 5.7 inch gift bags and ribbons, providing everything you need to wrap any gift - no matter the size. Perfect for regular and irregular shaped items.
Elegant Ribbon Handles: Satin ribbon handles add a special touch that elevates the packaging and makes your gift look more thoughtful and stylish.
Sturdy & Reusable: Our gift bags are made of extra thick 210 gsm cardstock that is durable, tear-resistant and reusable. No chemical odours - only safe and quality materials.
Luxury & Textured Design: The gift bags have a premium and textured finish that perfectly combines elegance and durability.

No Creases & Neat Appearance: Produced crease-free to ensure a smooth and wrinkle-free appearance on both sides for a flawless look. Perfect for birthdays, Christmas, weddings, baby shower, gift bags, jewellery, candy bags and more. These bags will make any occasion extra special.
